title: helichrysum litorale
intro: Helichrysum litorale, also known as Resurrection Plant, is a succulent plant that can survive extreme drought conditions, often drying out and then reviving when water is available. The medicinal properties of Helichrysum litorale include its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and supporting respiratory health, while also being used to treat digestive issues and skin conditions. Herbal preparations of Helichrysum litorale include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
